metadata.description: Search for 'The Dark Knight' on IMDb, navigate to its title page, and click the Watchlist button — verifying the AddIdToWatchlist mutation fires.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On IMDb, search for the movie 'The Dark Knight', open its title page, and add it to your Watchlist by clicking the '+ Watchlist' button. You will need to be signed in to complete this action.
